results.title: U.S. and Qatar explore mechanism to release frozen Iranian funds
results.description: The proposed arrangement, which is still being finalized, is expected to provide Tehran with access to a portion of the approximately $100 billion in Iranian funds currently blocked around the world.

results.title: Women Safety Key to Viksit Bharat: Panchayati Raj Secy Vivek Bharadwaj
results.description: Panchayati Raj Secy Vivek Bharadwaj says women's safety, dignity vital for Viksit Bharat@2047. Nirbhay Chetna initiative trains male leaders on gender equality.

results.title: Center must hold meeting with CMs to conduct NEET and other national-level examinations: CWC member Rudra Raju
results.description: CWC Member Gidugu Rudra Raju asked the Union government to hold a meeting with all the Chief Ministers of the respective States and take their suggest... Center must hold meeting with CMs to conduct NEET and other national-level examinations: CWC member Rudra Raju

results.title: I’ve been at war with council over my 7ft fence – it was approved 3 times & but I have to waste £10k fighting them
results.description: A HOMEOWNER has won a two-year planning battle with a council over a 7ft fence - that he says they approved three times but still tried to fight him over. Dr Michael Young claimed he spent £10,000 in his 30-month battle with the Royal Borough of Kensington and Chelsea (RBKC). The dispute - first reported...
